input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.4.1
            TITLE: teams that are not ready to run or cannot start their endurance event in the allowed time

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.4.1: Teams that are not ready to run or cannot start their Endurance event in the allowed time
D.12.4.1 Teams that are not ready to run or cannot start their Endurance event in the allowed time 
when their turn in the Run Order arrives:   
a. Will receive a time penalty (D.12.12.5)
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 135 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
b. May then run at the discretion of the Officials

final_answer: rule D.12.4.1: Teams that are not ready to run or cannot start their Endurance event in the allowed time D.12.4.1 Teams that are not ready to run or cannot start their Endurance event in the allowed time when their turn in the Run Order arrives: a. Will receive a time penalty (D.12.12.5) b. May then run at the discretion of the Officials
